name: BonVoyage Local Expert Agent
description: AI-powered Local Guide that suggests real, verified places, restaurants, and activities in a travel destination. Returns detailed place data with coordinates, local currency costs, time estimates, and insider tips.

skills.name: Local Places Recommendation
skills.description: Suggests specific places to visit, eat, and experience in a destination city. Enforces strict accuracy: real places only, correct geography, verified activities. Returns place name, type, hours needed, cost in local currency, GPS coordinates, and local tips.
examples: Suggest 10 places to visit in Lisbon for a foodie who loves history over 4 days.
What are the best hidden gems and restaurants in Barcelona for a 3-day trip?
